prompt_text:
### Demographics: 77-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 13 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after hyperglycemia symptoms (polyuria, polydipsia, weight loss)
Current symptoms: Postprandial fatigue and thirst noted; no DKA/HHS signs; no recent hypoglycemia

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 3a (45-59)
Heart failure: HFpEF (NYHA Class II)
MASH
Body mass index category: Normal
Alzheimer's Disease
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 3a (45-59); HF: HFpEF (NYHA Class II); ASCVD (No); MASLD: MASH; BMI Category: Normal
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (older brother)
- Social history: Never smoker; Alcohol 1-2 drinks/week

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 1000mg twice daily; Dapagliflozin 10mg once daily; Losartan (50 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily), Donepezil (10 mg nightly), Memantine (10 mg twice daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 64.4 kg; Height 184.1 cm; BMI 19.0 kg/m²; Blood pressure 130/69 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 8.5%; 9 months ago 7.8%; 6 months ago 7.3%; 3 months ago 7.3%; current 5.7%), FPG (12 months ago 180mg/dL; 9 months ago 210mg/dL; 6 months ago 174mg/dL; 3 months ago 170mg/dL; current 105mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 65.2kg; 9 months ago 63.8kg; 6 months ago 60.7kg; 3 months ago 62.1kg; current 64.4kg), Height (12 months ago 184.1cm; 9 months ago 184.1cm; 6 months ago 184.1cm; 3 months ago 184.1cm; current 184.1cm), BMI (12 months ago 19.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 19.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 18.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 18.0kg/m²; current 19.0kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 130mmHg; 9 months ago 132mmHg; 6 months ago 130mmHg; 3 months ago 134mmHg; current 130mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 71mmHg; 9 months ago 68mmHg; 6 months ago 70mmHg; 3 months ago 69mmHg; current 69mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 93U/L; 9 months ago 101U/L; 6 months ago 100U/L; 3 months ago 93U/L; current 94U/L), AST (12 months ago 101U/L; 9 months ago 102U/L; 6 months ago 102U/L; 3 months ago 110U/L; current 103U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 1.6mg/dL; 9 months ago 1.6mg/dL; 6 months ago 1.5mg/dL; 3 months ago 1.4mg/dL; current 1.4mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 52mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 51mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 52mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 48mL/min/1.73m²; current 49mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 136mg/g; 9 months ago 142mg/g; 6 months ago 162mg/g; 3 months ago 128mg/g; current 102mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 78mg/dL; 9 months ago 81mg/dL; 6 months ago 80mg/dL; 3 months ago 74mg/dL; current 77mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 43mg/dL; 9 months ago 45mg/dL; 6 months ago 45mg/dL; 3 months ago 43mg/dL; current 44mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 144mg/dL; 9 months ago 139mg/dL; 6 months ago 139mg/dL; 3 months ago 158mg/dL; current 151mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 13.0g/dL; 9 months ago 13.0g/dL; 6 months ago 13.0g/dL; 3 months ago 13.0g/dL; current 13.6g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Negative (Current); fasting C-peptide 0.87 ng/mL (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Excellent adherence (estimated ≥90%); SMBG 4-5 times/week; diet/exercise well controlled.
Financial context: Patient has standard insurance with moderate copays and a monthly medication budget of ≤ KRW 500,000.
